description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-breadcrumb` (T1-18). 4/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, item href/label typing, current page item typing, separator config
2. Accessibility — `<nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">` wrapper, `<ol>` list structure, current page has `aria-current="page"`, separators are presentational (aria-hidden), axe-core pass
3. Tests — current page marking, custom separators, truncation at width, last item is current
4. Storybook — various lengths, custom separator, with icons, truncated
5. CSS — separator styling, `--hx-*` tokens, truncation/overflow, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side current page marking

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-breadcrumb — T1-18 antagonistic quality review
